raw_consumer_statement:
I bought a XXXX cruise on XX/XX/XXXX with a deposit of XXXX. The trip was supposed to be in XX/XX/XXXX. I paid the balance of XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX for a total of XXXX. I had to cancel at end of XXXX due to life saving XXXX XXXX. Therefore, I disputed all charges to get my money back. 

XXXXXXXX XXXX gave me a credit back on this card of XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX. The XXXX investigator handling the case credited me back XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX. The remaining balance I have not gotten back is the deposit of XXXX. The investigator gave me the main cruise amount back but forgot about the deposit since it was paid on my credit card on a different date. 

On XX/XX/XXXX, I spoke to billing dispute supervisor XXXX who said she would re-open the dispute with the XXXX so he could credit me back the XXXX. She said this would take XXXX business days. Today is XX/XX/XXXX and no credit to my card has shown up. I have attached a spreadsheet with the simple calculations as well as the travel agent receipt from XXXX XXXX XXXX  which clearly shows the amounts paid and the credit from XXXX. 

I called the disputes department on XX/XX/XXXX and was told they had no idea how much longer this would take. XXXX clearly told me I was due the XXXX deposit and the only way to get it was to have the investigator take a second look and give me the credit. 

I also went to my local Citi branch to complain to the manager. She said she as no authority to get involved in credit card issues. I can't fight anymore. I have XXXX and am XXXX XXXX XXXX. Can you please get my XXXX credited to my Citi Mastercard?
